calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Continued To Sep-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for Lisa Lee (Petitioner).

Mr. Jew stated that they settled the matter, that they were waiting for one final signature which came in, that Counsel has been ill and asked the Court to grant the appointment of Lisa Lee as Successor Trustee and stated that he will dismiss the rest of the petition. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. is continued to September 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a stipulation to appoint Lisa Lee as the Successor Trustee and dismiss the remainder of the petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Continued To Aug-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for Lisa Lee (Petitioner) and specially appearing for Attorney Teddy Tsao-Wu for Yue Xian Tan (Respondent).

Mr. Jew stated that Ms. Tan resigned as Trustee, that the Parties have come to an agreement, that they are just waiting for Ms. Tan to sign the agreement and then he can take the petition off calendar, and that he would like the Court to appoint Ms. Lee as Successor Trustee. The Petition to Remove Trustee and to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to August 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Continued To Aug-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Continued To Jul-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for Lisa Lee (Petitioner).

Mr. Jew stated that Ms. Tan resigned as Trustee, that the parties are going to waive accountings on her part and that there was one transaction that his Client had an issue with, but it has been resolved. Mr. Jew also requested a continuance stating that they have been circulating a settlement agreement, and that the parties probably will be signing the agreement and then dismiss the petition.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Continued To Jun-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for Lisa Lee (Petitioner).

Mr. Jew stated that he is not sure why Mr. Tsao-Wu is not here, that Mr. Tsao-Wu had indicated that his Client was going to resign, that based on that he was intending to withdraw his petition to remove trustee, and that as far as the other issues go his Client's thought and the Beneficiaries agree to resolution and going through the accounting. The Petition to Remove Trustee and Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to June 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Teddy Tsao-Wu to appear on June 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear. The temporaary successor trustee will remain on until further order of the Court. Mr. Jew will sumbit an order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Continued To May-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for and with Lisa Lee (Petitioner).
Teddy Tsao-Wu for and with Yue Xian Tan (Trustee).

Mr. Jew stated that he does not have an order appointing Lisa as the Trustee, that they are very close to settling the matter, that they are working on the details to finalize it and requested a 45-day continuance. Mr. Jew also stated that the parties have agreed to have Lisa still serve as the Temporary Trustee, that they are contemplating Lisa will be the Successor Trustee, and that they have resolved the issue of redress breach of trust and the surcharge issue. Lisa's appointment as temporary successor trustee is extended to May 13, 2019. Mr. Jew is to provide a form of order to the Probate Examiner's attention. The Petition to Remove Trustee and to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to May 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Continued To Mar-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for and with Lisa Lee (Petitioner).
Teddy Tsao-Wu for and with Yuexain Tan (Trustee).
Sze-Hang Lo former Counsel for Yuexain Tan.

Mr. Wu stated that he was hoping to continue this as he just got hired last week. Mr. Jew asked that his Client be allowed to act as the temporary successor trustee for 30-days so they can work on sorting things out. The Court stated that Ms. Tan will need to account for the period of January 16, 2018 through today. Mr. Jew clarified that Ms. Tan will need to account up to November 5, 2018 which is when his Client was appointed as the temporary trustee. The Court extends Ms. Lee's appointment as temporary successor trustee. The Petition to Remove Trustee and to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to March 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee; Compel Accounting; Redress Breach Of Trust; And Denial Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Continued To Feb-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew for and with Lisa Lee (Petitioner).
Yuexan Tan (Trustee) in Propria Persona.
Francis Chin (Friend of Ms. Tan) also present.

Mr. Chin stated that he is here to translate for Ms. Tan and that Ms. Tan's Lawyer terminated his services. Mr. Jew stated that any form of communication has been extremely difficult. Mr. Chin stated that Ms. Tan feels she is not capable to continue as Trustee and that she accepts what ever party wants to take over. Mr. Jew raised the issue of Trustee's fees, other expenses related to Ms. Tan not acting, rental issues, hiring of a Landlord Tenant Attorney, the accounting, etc. The Court noted that there is no substitution of attorney on file, stated that Ms. Tan needs an Attorney to assist her with all of the above issues, asked Mr. Jew to prepare an order removing the Trustee and asked Mr. Chin if he could assist Ms. Tan with calling other Attorneys. Mr. Chin stated that he will help Ms. Tan. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Sze-Hang Lo of SHL Law Group to appear on February 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address the Court's concerns. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Ex Parte Application To Suspend Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
